templateDescription: SD-Access Edge Switch with IPv6 dual-stack overlay configuration
templateContent:
!
! ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
! ABHAVTECH SD-ACCESS EDGE SWITCH — DUAL-STACK IPv6
! Template Version: 1.0
! ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
!
hostname $hostname
!
! Enable IPv6
ipv6 unicast-routing
ipv6 cef
!
! ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
! LOOPBACK (RLOC) — DUAL-STACK
! ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
!
interface Loopback0
  description SD-ACCESS-RLOC
  ip address $loopback_ipv4 255.255.255.255
  ipv6 address $loopback_ipv6/128
  no shutdown
!
! ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
! LISP CONFIGURATION — DUAL-STACK
! ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
!
router lisp
  !
  locator-set RLOC-SET
    ipv4-interface Loopback0 priority 1 weight 50
    ipv6-interface Loopback0 priority 1 weight 50
    exit-locator-set
  !
  instance-id $lisp_instance_id
    !
    ! IPv4 service
    service ipv4
      eid-table vrf $vrf_name
      database-mapping $ipv4_eid_prefix locator-set RLOC-SET
      map-cache $ipv4_map_cache map-request
      map-server $map_server_ipv4 key $lisp_key
      map-resolver $map_server_ipv4
      exit-service-ipv4
    !
    ! IPv6 service
    service ipv6
      eid-table vrf $vrf_name
      database-mapping $ipv6_eid_prefix locator-set RLOC-SET
      map-cache $ipv6_map_cache map-request
      map-server $map_server_ipv6 key $lisp_key
      map-resolver $map_server_ipv6
      exit-service-ipv6
    !
  exit-instance-id
  !
  exit-router-lisp
!
! ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
! VRF DEFINITION — DUAL-STACK
! ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
!
vrf definition $vrf_name
  rd $route_distinguisher
  !
  address-family ipv4
    route-target export $route_target
    route-target import $route_target
  exit-address-family
  !
  address-family ipv6
    route-target export $route_target
    route-target import $route_target
  exit-address-family
!
! ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
! VXLAN (NVE INTERFACE)
! ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
!
interface nve1
  description FABRIC-VXLAN-TUNNEL
  no ip address
  source-interface Loopback0
  host-reachability protocol lisp
  member vni $vni vrf $vrf_name
  member vni $vni mcast-group $multicast_group
  member vni $l2vni vlan-based
  no shutdown
!
! ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
! OVERLAY SVI — ANYCAST GATEWAY DUAL-STACK
! ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
!
vlan $vlan_id
  name $vlan_name
!
interface Vlan$vlan_id
  description ANYCAST-GW-$vrf_name-DUAL-STACK
  vrf forwarding $vrf_name
  !
  ! IPv4 gateway
  ip address $ipv4_gateway $ipv4_mask
  ip helper-address $dhcp_server_ipv4
  !
  ! IPv6 gateway
  ipv6 address $ipv6_gateway/$ipv6_prefix_len
  ipv6 enable
  !
  ! IPv6 Router Advertisement (SLAAC)
  ipv6 nd managed-config-flag
  ipv6 nd other-config-flag
  ipv6 nd ra interval 200
  ipv6 nd ra lifetime 1800
  !
  ! DNS via RA (RFC 8106)
  ipv6 nd ra dns server $dns_server_ipv6 lifetime 1800
  ipv6 nd ra dns search-list $dns_domain lifetime 1800
  !
  ! Anycast MAC (same for IPv4 and IPv6)
  mac-address $anycast_mac
  !
  ! LISP mobility
  lisp mobility dynamic-eid DYNAMIC_EID_v4
  lisp mobility dynamic-eid DYNAMIC_EID_v6
  !
  no ip redirects
  no ipv6 redirects
  no shutdown
!
vlan configuration $vlan_id
  member evpn-instance $vni vni $l2vni
!
! ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
! IPv6 DEVICE TRACKING POLICY
! ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
!
ipv6 device-tracking policy IPDT-POLICY-v6
  description IPv6-First-Hop-Security
  tracking enable
  security-level glean
  prefix-list $ipv6_eid_prefix
  protocol ndp
  protocol dhcp
  limit address-count 10
  exit
!
! ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
! RA GUARD POLICY
! ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
!
ipv6 nd raguard policy RA-GUARD-POLICY
  description Block-Rogue-RAs-From-Endpoints
  device-role host
  exit
!
! ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
! ACCESS PORT CONFIGURATION (TEMPLATE)
! ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
!
#INTERACTIVE
interface range $access_port_range
  description USER-ACCESS-DUAL-STACK
  switchport mode access
  switchport access vlan $vlan_id
  !
  ! 802.1X authentication
  authentication host-mode multi-auth
  authentication order dot1x mab
  authentication priority dot1x mab
  authentication port-control auto
  authentication periodic
  authentication timer reauthenticate server
  mab
  dot1x pae authenticator
  dot1x timeout tx-period 7
  !
  ! TrustSec
  cts role-based enforcement
  !
  ! IPv4 + IPv6 source guard
  ip verify source
  ipv6 verify source
  !
  ! IPv6 device tracking
  ipv6 device-tracking attach-policy IPDT-POLICY-v6
  !
  ! RA Guard
  ipv6 nd raguard attach-policy RA-GUARD-POLICY
  !
  ! DHCP snooping
  ip dhcp snooping limit rate 10
  !
  ! Spanning tree
  spanning-tree portfast
  spanning-tree bpduguard enable
  !
  no shutdown
#END_INTERACTIVE
!
end

templateParams.description: Access port range for user connectivity
